items.title: pdb
items.description: IDE debuggers add a GUI on the same model (pause/inspect/step) that pdb taught you.

items.title: Logging for Debugging
items.description: Logpoints are 'a print without code changes'; logging is the persistent equivalent in production.

items.title: cProfile
items.description: IDE debuggers help you understand WHY code does what it does; cProfile helps you understand HOW LONG it takes.

items.title: Cells & Kernels (Jupyter)
items.description: Both VS Code and PyCharm support cell-level debugging on the same kernel.

items.title: Notebooks Best Practices
items.description: Cell debuggers let you inspect live state without restarting the kernel — preserves your in-memory caches.
